text.message: I'm on the same wood as you man
I can help you get road
Cut red and he doesn't either
Red having road was better than white
And if white took it red could have gotten it back if he built the other way
Then they were fighting for road
Much better than red dominating it. White was only at 5 roads
You win with road, no trades
I can give you wood white
But I want him to extend
